TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Misatataday_to_Taywan_yofayof_a_analal, title = Misatataday_to_Taywan_yofayof_a_analal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Misatataday_to_Taywan_yofayof_a_analal} }

S.FORM: == Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal == Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal, (roma a saowal To-tay-huy-an), fangafang i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, Conghuaminko Fawopo Tiyawcaci pakayni i pikapot to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof sakasaan, micomod i koli Cinhua daykako mirepet to Cinta likisi kingkiwso a mitiliday ci Liao Weicheng, toya a romi'ad mirepet to misawaday to nai Tayta syakay kingkiwso a dademakay to tilidan ci Chen Zhengran, syakay onto tamdaw ci Wang Xiuhui ato lindosi ci Masao Nikar (kowping ngangan: Lin yinfo), ikor no tosa romi'ad marepet ko cecay tamdaw mipadamaay to sinting a tilid kapah no Rokay finacadan ci Cegau Drululan . Ano pakayraen to itiyaay ho a "Mina'is (Cence) miliyangay sakarikec" ato "Conghoaminko a sarikec" saka 100 liyad a mirawraway to laloma'an, oya lalimaay marepetay tamdaw latek o papatayen. Ikor no demak no sifo a saan o mangalefay ko piforaw to "kimpo no Conghoaminko" pa'orip to pakoniyah a sawal, pararawraw to masangotefohay a finawlan no Taywan matatongoday a piliyang to sici. Tangasa ikor o lipoyin ta'angay finawlan a pilepi saranikay sato mihaydah to nifalic "Conghoaminko a sarikec" saka 100 liyad, palasawad to "Mina'is (Cence) miliyangay sakarikec", tahaikor o nia lalimaay marepetay paherek to kaawaay no raraw a mapalafac. Pido'edoan 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad to pacerem, Fawopo Tiyawcaci dademakay micomod i koli Cinhua daykako, mirepet to Cinta likisi kingkiwso a mitiliday ci Liao Weicheng; toya romi'ad, toya a romi'ad mirepet to misawaday to nai Tayta syakay kingkiwso a dademakay to tilidan ci Chen Zhengran, syakay onto tamdaw ci Wang Xiuhui ato lindosi ci Masao Nikar, pa'eses to sasepatay milayap to itiraay i Dipong a Taywan misatataday ontoay ci Shi Ming padama to saka i Taywan micowat to pisatataday to Taywan yofayof (To-tay-huy) sakapot. Sato i 5 folad 11 romi'ad marepet mipadangay ci Masao Nikaran pacipat to To-tay-huy sapisinting ci Cegau Drululan. Nika so'elinay, marepet ko na lalimaay caayay kao miri'angay ko pakayraan a demakan, nika o pisa'osi to nitilidan ni Shi Ming a hong to "Taywan tamdaw 400 miheca likisi", nao tayraay i Dipong miliso' ci Shi Mingan, minokay tayni Taywan midama misanga' to To-tay-huy sapakilac a sapisinting a tilid. I 1991 miheca 12 folad 3 romi'ad, satakaraway hoyin no Taywan midotoc to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad saka 2 toris ko sapitefoc, patefoc ci Liao Weicheng awaay lafo; ci Cegau Drululan (An Cenkoang) patefoc 10 folad, pasarar to 3 miheca; ci Chen Zhengran, ci Wang Xiuhui aci Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) o cifaloco'ay mirawraw to laloma'an a lafo, matefoc to 3 miheca tangasa 1 miheca 6 folad a pirofo. I 1992 miheca 7 folad 27 romi'ad, misalof to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad misitapang, mapalasawad ko sapisamawmaw a mirawraw a lafo a tefoc, oya To-tay-huy-an mapatiko a mitomadaw. I 1992 miheca 7 folad 27 romi'ad, nawhani ca Liao Weicheng papina caay ka ci todong to sapifelih to nisalofan to a "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad, polong no lafo mafalic to caayto ka tomadawen. Pifiyor Nawhani i 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad mapalasawaday to ko karawrawan a romi'ad, laloma'an no Taywan saki sician ato harateng pakayni i 1990 mihecaan saka 2 folad kalalifetan no sici ato saka 3 folad no mitiliday a onto, mafohatay to ko kasahiraira; oya sa a pitedalan to a nitomadawan to caay pakafana'en ko Cinta pitilidan a talifahal sanay a micomod mirepet to mitiliday a demak no mipalitaay, o saka cadi'eci' miliyang ko syakay no Taywan ato daykako pitilidan. I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, Cinta mitiliday tayra i Taypisi a mipalitaay miliyang; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 14 romi'ad, Lawtongtang satakaraway tangpo mihapiw "Mifelih to fa'elohay faohecalay katalawan a pi'ang'ang", mitoro' ci Lee Tenghuy sifo "mirepet to matelangay a Lee tenghuy" To-tay sifo mirepet to To-tay a kapah, oya mangahay a demak", pacecay to sowal kao awaayay ko raraw palafac to sasepatay tamdaw ; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, nai polong no kitakit a kasa daykako mitiliday ma'emin misawad mitilid tayra i Taypi siyataw mikihatiya to miliyangay a demak, mingitangit to "Feyco cence panloan tiawli, fantoy cence pohay" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway, miliyang to pakari'ang no sici), tangasa saka 5 folad 20 romi'ad a mapalasawad; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lifayin kina tolo misa'osi mahayda mapalasawad jo "cence panloan tiawli" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway), ca Liao Weicheng, Chen Zhengran a sasepat mapasadak itiya, dengan 9 romi'ad ko pirofoan cangraan itiya, Toya romi'ad, oya mikiharay to mi'esesay to mitiliday a micomod i Ciawtong daykako a demak, mihayda ko mipalitaay no Sincusi palitaay kakeridan ci Lin Hongcen (mama ni Lin Ceci) misawad a miliyas ; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad, o cifana'ay, syakay onto ato mincintang mipalowad to "520 mifelih to piri'ang no sici a pirakat", milongoc to "sofitay, imeng, misolapay" tararikor masadak i pitilidan; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 24 romi'ad, aci "cence panloan tiawli" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway) pakayraay to "pirepet to mari'angay a liyad" nanoya a mapalasawad; i 1991 miheca 9 folad, sakakaay kingkiwyin yinsi ci Lee Cenyun a pinapina tamdaw patireng to "100 dademakay kapolongan", mingitangit ci Lee Tenghuy (Li tenghuy) a sifo palasawad to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad. Ikor to no To-tay-huy-an, matedal to ko saki mapakoniraay no sowal, laloma'an no pitilidan o saki Taywan likisi ponka kingkiw sanay a ngangan a kasacefang ala patiretireng sato. Itiyaay a syakay a kasasowalen, mimaan mirepet to tamdaw a mirofo a mitefoc. Oya 100 dademakay kapolongan padoedo misinting, micikeroh to harateng nangra, masasicalay to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad a mafadesay a laloma'an to pipalowad mitangic, nanoya midemak to "Palasawad to mi'iloay rikec 10 'ofad tamdaw to mipanganganay onto". Itini i kasasiroma no sici a kasasiwtoc, o Lifayin i 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad kinatolo misa'osi mihayda to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad a pisalof, mapalasawad ko nia misamawmaway mirawraw a 'ilo sanay a tefoc, itini i sarikec milaheci to pakoniraay a harateng, pakoniraay pikingkiw ato pakoniraay a sowal. Nikawrira o kumintang i Lifayin a sarekad pipaci'eci, o "Conghoaminko a rikec saka 100 liyad" caay ka saheci ko pipalasawad. Kasatodong no nitilidan I 2015 miheca, ci Liaw Cienhua papina cangra pakayni i flyingV no finawlan pipasorot to payso a milaheci to nisyasingan a ika "Motay panloanfan (Saikoray a mifelihay a ci'iloay), i 5 folad 9 romi'ad itira i 1914 ponka misanga'ay to kinaira a 'etal kongtin huasan ikakang panengneng, ci Shi Ming mikihatiya itiya to nia pinengnengan . 7 folad 24 romi'ad, polong no ika i calay mapanengneng. Pinengnengan. Misatataday to Taywan yofayof. Taywan sician likisi. Taywan kohecalay katalawan a mihecaan. Kohecalay katalawan Pi'arawan to tilid 2.末代叛亂犯 The Last Insurrection, Youtube, (2019-09-21), ( Taiwan Memory. 2015-07-29) .
S.PHON: == misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ, (ro~uma a sao~uwaɾ to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an), faŋafaŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u fawo~upo~u tijawʦaʦi pakajni i pikapo~ut to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf sakasaan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi ʦinħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mirəpət to~u ʦinta ɾikisi kiŋkiwso~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u misawaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai tajta sjakaj kiŋkiwso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, sjakaj o~unto~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u ɾinɬ~ɮo~usi ʦi masao~u nikar (ko~uwpiŋ ŋaŋan: ɾin jinfo~u), iko~ur no~u to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət ko~u ʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw mipaɬ~ɮamaaj to~u sintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ kapaħ no~u ro~ukaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan . ano~u pakajraən to~u itijaaj ħo~u a "minaʡis (ʦənʦə) miɾijaŋaj sakarikəʦ" ato~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a sarikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a mirawrawaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, o~uja ɾaɾimaaj marəpətaj tamɬ~ɮaw ɾatək o~u papatajən. iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sifo~u a saan o~u maŋaɾəfaj ko~u pifo~uraw to~u "kimpo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u" paʡo~urip to~u pako~unijaħ a sawaɾ, pararawraw to~u masaŋo~utəfo~uħaj a finawɾan no~u tajwan matato~uŋo~uɬ~ɮaj a piɾijaŋ to~u siʦi. taŋasa iko~ur o~u ɾipo~ujin taʡaŋaj finawɾan a piɾəpi saranikaj sato~u miħajɬ~ɮaħ to~u nifaɾiʦ "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a sarikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "minaʡis (ʦənʦə) miɾijaŋaj sakarikəʦ", taħaiko~ur o~u nia ɾaɾimaaj marəpətaj paħərək to~u kaawaaj no~u raraw a mapaɾafaʦ. piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u paʦərəm, fawo~upo~u tijawʦaʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi ʦinħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət to~u ʦinta ɾikisi kiŋkiwso~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ; to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u misawaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai tajta sjakaj kiŋkiwso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, sjakaj o~unto~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u ɾinɬ~ɮo~usi ʦi masao~u nikar, paʡəsəs to~u sasəpataj miɾajap to~u itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tajwan misatataɬ~ɮaj o~unto~uaj ʦi sħi miŋ paɬ~ɮama to~u saka i tajwan miʦo~uwat to~u pisatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf (to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj) sakapo~ut. sato~u i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj ʦi masao~u nikaran paʦipat to~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj sapisintiŋ ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan. nika so~uʡəɾinaj, marəpət ko~u na ɾaɾimaaj ʦaajaj kao~u miriʡaŋaj ko~u pakajraan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, nika o~u pisaʡo~usi to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ a ħo~uŋ to~u "tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw *** miħəʦa ɾikisi", nao~u tajraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ ʦi sħi miŋan, mino~ukaj tajni tajwan miɬ~ɮama misaŋaʡ to~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj sapakiɾaʦ a sapisintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, satakarawaj ħo~ujin no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~uris ko~u sapitəfo~uʦ, patəfo~uʦ ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ awaaj ɾafo~u; ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan (an ʦənko~uaŋ) patəfo~uʦ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, pasarar to~u * miħəʦa; ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui aʦi masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) o~u ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj mirawraw to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a ɾafo~u, matəfo~uʦ to~u * miħəʦa taŋasa * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a piro~ufo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misaɾo~uf to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ misitapaŋ, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapisamawmaw a mirawraw a ɾafo~u a təfo~uʦ, o~uja to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an mapatiko~u a mito~umaɬ~ɮaw. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani ʦa ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ papina ʦaaj ka ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapifəɾiħ to~u nisaɾo~ufan to~u a "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾafo~u mafaɾiʦ to~u ʦaajto~u ka to~umaɬ~ɮawən. pifijo~ur nawħani i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u karawrawan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan saki siʦian ato~u ħaratəŋ pakajni i **** miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kaɾaɾifətan no~u siʦi ato~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a o~unto~u, mafo~uħataj to~u ko~u kasaħiraira; o~uja sa a pitəɬ~ɮaɾan to~u a nito~umaɬ~ɮawan to~u ʦaaj pakafanaʡən ko~u ʦinta pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a taɾifaħaɾ sanaj a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mipaɾitaaj, o~u saka ʦaɬ~ɮiʡəʦiʡ miɾijaŋ ko~u sjakaj no~u tajwan ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦinta mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tajra i tajpisi a mipaɾitaaj miɾijaŋ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾawto~uŋtaŋ satakarawaj taŋpo~u miħapiw "mifəɾiħ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj fao~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a piʡaŋʡaŋ", mito~uro~uʡ ʦi ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj sifo~u "mirəpət to~u matəɾaŋaj a ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj" to~u-taj sifo~u mirəpət to~u to~u-taj a kapaħ, o~uja maŋaħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak", paʦəʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ kao~u awaajaj ko~u raraw paɾafaʦ to~u sasəpataj tamɬ~ɮaw ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nai po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a kasa ɬ~ɮajkako~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj maʡəmin misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tajra i tajpi sijataw mikiħatija to~u miɾijaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, miŋitaŋit to~u "fəjʦo~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi, fanto~uj ʦənʦə po~uħaj" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj, miɾijaŋ to~u pakariʡaŋ no~u siʦi), taŋasa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kina to~uɾo~u misaʡo~usi maħajɬ~ɮa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ jo~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj), ʦa ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, ʦħən *ħəŋran a sasəpat mapasaɬ~ɮak itija, ɬ~ɮəŋan * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u piro~ufo~uan ʦaŋraan itija, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja mikiħaraj to~u miʡəsəsaj to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦiawto~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u mipaɾitaaj no~u sinʦo~u~usi paɾitaaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin ħo~uŋʦən (mama ni ɾin ʦəʦi) misawaɬ~ɮ a miɾijas ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦifanaʡaj, sjakaj o~unto~u ato~u minʦintaŋ mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "*** mifəɾiħ to~u piriʡaŋ no~u siʦi a pirakat", miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "so~ufitaj, iməŋ, miso~uɾapaj" tarariko~ur masaɬ~ɮak i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, aʦi "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj) pakajraaj to~u "pirəpət to~u mariʡaŋaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ" nano~uja a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, sakakaaj kiŋkiwjin jinsi ʦi ɾəə ʦənjo~u~un a pinapina tamɬ~ɮaw patirəŋ to~u "*** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan", miŋitaŋit ʦi ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj (ɾi təŋħo~u~uj) a sifo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur to~u no~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an, matəɬ~ɮaɾ to~u ko~u saki mapako~uniraaj no~u so~uwaɾ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan o~u saki tajwan ɾikisi po~unka kiŋkiw sanaj a ŋaŋan a kasaʦəfaŋ aɾa patirətirəŋ sato~u. itijaaj a sjakaj a kasaso~uwaɾən, mimaan mirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miro~ufo~u a mitəfo~uʦ. o~uja *** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u misintiŋ, miʦikəro~uħ to~u ħaratəŋ naŋra, masasiʦaɾaj to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a mafaɬ~ɮəsaj a ɾaɾo~umaʡan to~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ mitaŋiʦ, nano~uja miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʡiɾo~uaj rikəʦ ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mipaŋaŋanaj o~unto~u". itini i kasasiro~uma no~u siʦi a kasasiwto~uʦ, o~u ɾifajin i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kinato~uɾo~u misaʡo~usi miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a pisaɾo~uf, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u nia misamawmawaj mirawraw a ʡiɾo~u sanaj a təfo~uʦ, itini i sarikəʦ miɾaħəʦi to~u pako~uniraaj a ħaratəŋ, pako~uniraaj pikiŋkiw ato~u pako~uniraaj a so~uwaɾ. nikawrira o~u ko~u~umintaŋ i ɾifajin a sarəkaɬ~ɮ pipaʦiʡəʦi, o~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ" ʦaaj ka saħəʦi ko~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ. kasato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan i **** miħəʦa, ʦi ɾiaw ʦiənħo~u~ua papina ʦaŋra pakajni i fɾjiŋb~v no~u finawɾan pipaso~uro~ut to~u pajso~u a miɾaħəʦi to~u nisjasiŋan a ika "mo~utaj panɾo~uanfan (saiko~uraj a mifəɾiħaj a ʦiʡiɾo~uaj), i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i **** po~unka misaŋaʡaj to~u kinaira a ʡətaɾ ko~uŋtin ħo~u~uasan ikakaŋ panəŋnəŋ, ʦi sħi miŋ mikiħatija itija to~u nia pinəŋnəŋan . * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ika i ʦaɾaj mapanəŋnəŋ. pinəŋnəŋan. misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf. tajwan siʦian ɾikisi. tajwan ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a miħəʦaan. ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan piʡarawan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *.***** tħə ɾast inso~u~urrəʦtio~un, jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və, (****-**-**), ( taiwan məmo~urj. ****-**-**) .
S.FORM: == Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal == Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal, (roma a saowal To-tay-huy-an), fangafang i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, Conghuaminko Fawopo Tiyawcaci pakayni i pikapot to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof sakasaan, micomod i koli Cinhua daykako mirepet to Cinta likisi kingkiwso a mitiliday ci Liao Weicheng, toya a romi'ad mirepet to misawaday to nai Tayta syakay kingkiwso a dademakay to tilidan ci Chen Zhengran, syakay onto tamdaw ci Wang Xiuhui ato lindosi ci Masao Nikar (kowping ngangan: Lin yinfo), ikor no tosa romi'ad marepet ko cecay tamdaw mipadamaay to sinting a tilid kapah no Rokay finacadan ci Cegau Drululan . Ano pakayraen to itiyaay ho a "Mina'is (Cence) miliyangay sakarikec" ato "Conghoaminko a sarikec" saka 100 liyad a mirawraway to laloma'an, oya lalimaay marepetay tamdaw latek o papatayen. Ikor no demak no sifo a saan o mangalefay ko piforaw to "kimpo no Conghoaminko" pa'orip to pakoniyah a sawal, pararawraw to masangotefohay a finawlan no Taywan matatongoday a piliyang to sici. Tangasa ikor o lipoyin ta'angay finawlan a pilepi saranikay sato mihaydah to nifalic "Conghoaminko a sarikec" saka 100 liyad, palasawad to "Mina'is (Cence) miliyangay sakarikec", tahaikor o nia lalimaay marepetay paherek to kaawaay no raraw a mapalafac. Pido'edoan 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad to pacerem, Fawopo Tiyawcaci dademakay micomod i koli Cinhua daykako, mirepet to Cinta likisi kingkiwso a mitiliday ci Liao Weicheng; toya romi'ad, toya a romi'ad mirepet to misawaday to nai Tayta syakay kingkiwso a dademakay to tilidan ci Chen Zhengran, syakay onto tamdaw ci Wang Xiuhui ato lindosi ci Masao Nikar, pa'eses to sasepatay milayap to itiraay i Dipong a Taywan misatataday ontoay ci Shi Ming padama to saka i Taywan micowat to pisatataday to Taywan yofayof (To-tay-huy) sakapot. Sato i 5 folad 11 romi'ad marepet mipadangay ci Masao Nikaran pacipat to To-tay-huy sapisinting ci Cegau Drululan. Nika so'elinay, marepet ko na lalimaay caayay kao miri'angay ko pakayraan a demakan, nika o pisa'osi to nitilidan ni Shi Ming a hong to "Taywan tamdaw 400 miheca likisi", nao tayraay i Dipong miliso' ci Shi Mingan, minokay tayni Taywan midama misanga' to To-tay-huy sapakilac a sapisinting a tilid. I 1991 miheca 12 folad 3 romi'ad, satakaraway hoyin no Taywan midotoc to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad saka 2 toris ko sapitefoc, patefoc ci Liao Weicheng awaay lafo; ci Cegau Drululan (An Cenkoang) patefoc 10 folad, pasarar to 3 miheca; ci Chen Zhengran, ci Wang Xiuhui aci Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) o cifaloco'ay mirawraw to laloma'an a lafo, matefoc to 3 miheca tangasa 1 miheca 6 folad a pirofo. I 1992 miheca 7 folad 27 romi'ad, misalof to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad misitapang, mapalasawad ko sapisamawmaw a mirawraw a lafo a tefoc, oya To-tay-huy-an mapatiko a mitomadaw. I 1992 miheca 7 folad 27 romi'ad, nawhani ca Liao Weicheng papina caay ka ci todong to sapifelih to nisalofan to a "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad, polong no lafo mafalic to caayto ka tomadawen. Pifiyor Nawhani i 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad mapalasawaday to ko karawrawan a romi'ad, laloma'an no Taywan saki sician ato harateng pakayni i 1990 mihecaan saka 2 folad kalalifetan no sici ato saka 3 folad no mitiliday a onto, mafohatay to ko kasahiraira; oya sa a pitedalan to a nitomadawan to caay pakafana'en ko Cinta pitilidan a talifahal sanay a micomod mirepet to mitiliday a demak no mipalitaay, o saka cadi'eci' miliyang ko syakay no Taywan ato daykako pitilidan. I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, Cinta mitiliday tayra i Taypisi a mipalitaay miliyang; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 14 romi'ad, Lawtongtang satakaraway tangpo mihapiw "Mifelih to fa'elohay faohecalay katalawan a pi'ang'ang", mitoro' ci Lee Tenghuy sifo "mirepet to matelangay a Lee tenghuy" To-tay sifo mirepet to To-tay a kapah, oya mangahay a demak", pacecay to sowal kao awaayay ko raraw palafac to sasepatay tamdaw ; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, nai polong no kitakit a kasa daykako mitiliday ma'emin misawad mitilid tayra i Taypi siyataw mikihatiya to miliyangay a demak, mingitangit to "Feyco cence panloan tiawli, fantoy cence pohay" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway, miliyang to pakari'ang no sici), tangasa saka 5 folad 20 romi'ad a mapalasawad; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lifayin kina tolo misa'osi mahayda mapalasawad jo "cence panloan tiawli" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway), ca Liao Weicheng, Chen Zhengran a sasepat mapasadak itiya, dengan 9 romi'ad ko pirofoan cangraan itiya, Toya romi'ad, oya mikiharay to mi'esesay to mitiliday a micomod i Ciawtong daykako a demak, mihayda ko mipalitaay no Sincusi palitaay kakeridan ci Lin Hongcen (mama ni Lin Ceci) misawad a miliyas ; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad, o cifana'ay, syakay onto ato mincintang mipalowad to "520 mifelih to piri'ang no sici a pirakat", milongoc to "sofitay, imeng, misolapay" tararikor masadak i pitilidan; i 1991 miheca 5 folad 24 romi'ad, aci "cence panloan tiawli" (palasawad to sapitefoc to mirawraway) pakayraay to "pirepet to mari'angay a liyad" nanoya a mapalasawad; i 1991 miheca 9 folad, sakakaay kingkiwyin yinsi ci Lee Cenyun a pinapina tamdaw patireng to "100 dademakay kapolongan", mingitangit ci Lee Tenghuy (Li tenghuy) a sifo palasawad to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad. Ikor to no To-tay-huy-an, matedal to ko saki mapakoniraay no sowal, laloma'an no pitilidan o saki Taywan likisi ponka kingkiw sanay a ngangan a kasacefang ala patiretireng sato. Itiyaay a syakay a kasasowalen, mimaan mirepet to tamdaw a mirofo a mitefoc. Oya 100 dademakay kapolongan padoedo misinting, micikeroh to harateng nangra, masasicalay to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad a mafadesay a laloma'an to pipalowad mitangic, nanoya midemak to "Palasawad to mi'iloay rikec 10 'ofad tamdaw to mipanganganay onto". Itini i kasasiroma no sici a kasasiwtoc, o Lifayin i 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad kinatolo misa'osi mihayda to "Conghoaminko a rikec" saka 100 liyad a pisalof, mapalasawad ko nia misamawmaway mirawraw a 'ilo sanay a tefoc, itini i sarikec milaheci to pakoniraay a harateng, pakoniraay pikingkiw ato pakoniraay a sowal. Nikawrira o kumintang i Lifayin a sarekad pipaci'eci, o "Conghoaminko a rikec saka 100 liyad" caay ka saheci ko pipalasawad. Kasatodong no nitilidan I 2015 miheca, ci Liaw Cienhua papina cangra pakayni i flyingV no finawlan pipasorot to payso a milaheci to nisyasingan a ika "Motay panloanfan (Saikoray a mifelihay a ci'iloay), i 5 folad 9 romi'ad itira i 1914 ponka misanga'ay to kinaira a 'etal kongtin huasan ikakang panengneng, ci Shi Ming mikihatiya itiya to nia pinengnengan . 7 folad 24 romi'ad, polong no ika i calay mapanengneng. Pinengnengan. Misatataday to Taywan yofayof. Taywan sician likisi. Taywan kohecalay katalawan a mihecaan. Kohecalay katalawan Pi'arawan to tilid 2.末代叛亂犯 The Last Insurrection, Youtube, (2019-09-21), ( Taiwan Memory. 2015-07-29) .
S.PHON: == misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ, (ro~uma a sao~uwaɾ to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an), faŋafaŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u fawo~upo~u tijawʦaʦi pakajni i pikapo~ut to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf sakasaan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi ʦinħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mirəpət to~u ʦinta ɾikisi kiŋkiwso~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u misawaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai tajta sjakaj kiŋkiwso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, sjakaj o~unto~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u ɾinɬ~ɮo~usi ʦi masao~u nikar (ko~uwpiŋ ŋaŋan: ɾin jinfo~u), iko~ur no~u to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət ko~u ʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw mipaɬ~ɮamaaj to~u sintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ kapaħ no~u ro~ukaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan . ano~u pakajraən to~u itijaaj ħo~u a "minaʡis (ʦənʦə) miɾijaŋaj sakarikəʦ" ato~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a sarikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a mirawrawaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, o~uja ɾaɾimaaj marəpətaj tamɬ~ɮaw ɾatək o~u papatajən. iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sifo~u a saan o~u maŋaɾəfaj ko~u pifo~uraw to~u "kimpo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u" paʡo~urip to~u pako~unijaħ a sawaɾ, pararawraw to~u masaŋo~utəfo~uħaj a finawɾan no~u tajwan matato~uŋo~uɬ~ɮaj a piɾijaŋ to~u siʦi. taŋasa iko~ur o~u ɾipo~ujin taʡaŋaj finawɾan a piɾəpi saranikaj sato~u miħajɬ~ɮaħ to~u nifaɾiʦ "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a sarikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "minaʡis (ʦənʦə) miɾijaŋaj sakarikəʦ", taħaiko~ur o~u nia ɾaɾimaaj marəpətaj paħərək to~u kaawaaj no~u raraw a mapaɾafaʦ. piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u paʦərəm, fawo~upo~u tijawʦaʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi ʦinħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət to~u ʦinta ɾikisi kiŋkiwso~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ; to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u misawaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai tajta sjakaj kiŋkiwso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, sjakaj o~unto~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u ɾinɬ~ɮo~usi ʦi masao~u nikar, paʡəsəs to~u sasəpataj miɾajap to~u itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tajwan misatataɬ~ɮaj o~unto~uaj ʦi sħi miŋ paɬ~ɮama to~u saka i tajwan miʦo~uwat to~u pisatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf (to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj) sakapo~ut. sato~u i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj ʦi masao~u nikaran paʦipat to~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj sapisintiŋ ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan. nika so~uʡəɾinaj, marəpət ko~u na ɾaɾimaaj ʦaajaj kao~u miriʡaŋaj ko~u pakajraan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, nika o~u pisaʡo~usi to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ a ħo~uŋ to~u "tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw *** miħəʦa ɾikisi", nao~u tajraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ ʦi sħi miŋan, mino~ukaj tajni tajwan miɬ~ɮama misaŋaʡ to~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj sapakiɾaʦ a sapisintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, satakarawaj ħo~ujin no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~uris ko~u sapitəfo~uʦ, patəfo~uʦ ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ awaaj ɾafo~u; ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan (an ʦənko~uaŋ) patəfo~uʦ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, pasarar to~u * miħəʦa; ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui aʦi masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) o~u ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj mirawraw to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a ɾafo~u, matəfo~uʦ to~u * miħəʦa taŋasa * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a piro~ufo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misaɾo~uf to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ misitapaŋ, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapisamawmaw a mirawraw a ɾafo~u a təfo~uʦ, o~uja to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an mapatiko~u a mito~umaɬ~ɮaw. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani ʦa ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ papina ʦaaj ka ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapifəɾiħ to~u nisaɾo~ufan to~u a "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾafo~u mafaɾiʦ to~u ʦaajto~u ka to~umaɬ~ɮawən. pifijo~ur nawħani i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u karawrawan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan saki siʦian ato~u ħaratəŋ pakajni i **** miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kaɾaɾifətan no~u siʦi ato~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a o~unto~u, mafo~uħataj to~u ko~u kasaħiraira; o~uja sa a pitəɬ~ɮaɾan to~u a nito~umaɬ~ɮawan to~u ʦaaj pakafanaʡən ko~u ʦinta pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a taɾifaħaɾ sanaj a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ mirəpət to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mipaɾitaaj, o~u saka ʦaɬ~ɮiʡəʦiʡ miɾijaŋ ko~u sjakaj no~u tajwan ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦinta mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tajra i tajpisi a mipaɾitaaj miɾijaŋ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾawto~uŋtaŋ satakarawaj taŋpo~u miħapiw "mifəɾiħ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj fao~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a piʡaŋʡaŋ", mito~uro~uʡ ʦi ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj sifo~u "mirəpət to~u matəɾaŋaj a ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj" to~u-taj sifo~u mirəpət to~u to~u-taj a kapaħ, o~uja maŋaħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak", paʦəʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ kao~u awaajaj ko~u raraw paɾafaʦ to~u sasəpataj tamɬ~ɮaw ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nai po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a kasa ɬ~ɮajkako~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj maʡəmin misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tajra i tajpi sijataw mikiħatija to~u miɾijaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, miŋitaŋit to~u "fəjʦo~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi, fanto~uj ʦənʦə po~uħaj" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj, miɾijaŋ to~u pakariʡaŋ no~u siʦi), taŋasa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kina to~uɾo~u misaʡo~usi maħajɬ~ɮa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ jo~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj), ʦa ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, ʦħən *ħəŋran a sasəpat mapasaɬ~ɮak itija, ɬ~ɮəŋan * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u piro~ufo~uan ʦaŋraan itija, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja mikiħaraj to~u miʡəsəsaj to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦiawto~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u mipaɾitaaj no~u sinʦo~u~usi paɾitaaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin ħo~uŋʦən (mama ni ɾin ʦəʦi) misawaɬ~ɮ a miɾijas ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦifanaʡaj, sjakaj o~unto~u ato~u minʦintaŋ mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "*** mifəɾiħ to~u piriʡaŋ no~u siʦi a pirakat", miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "so~ufitaj, iməŋ, miso~uɾapaj" tarariko~ur masaɬ~ɮak i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, aʦi "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi" (paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ to~u mirawrawaj) pakajraaj to~u "pirəpət to~u mariʡaŋaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ" nano~uja a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, sakakaaj kiŋkiwjin jinsi ʦi ɾəə ʦənjo~u~un a pinapina tamɬ~ɮaw patirəŋ to~u "*** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan", miŋitaŋit ʦi ɾəə təŋħo~u~uj (ɾi təŋħo~u~uj) a sifo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur to~u no~u to~u-taj-ħo~u~uj-an, matəɬ~ɮaɾ to~u ko~u saki mapako~uniraaj no~u so~uwaɾ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan o~u saki tajwan ɾikisi po~unka kiŋkiw sanaj a ŋaŋan a kasaʦəfaŋ aɾa patirətirəŋ sato~u. itijaaj a sjakaj a kasaso~uwaɾən, mimaan mirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miro~ufo~u a mitəfo~uʦ. o~uja *** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u misintiŋ, miʦikəro~uħ to~u ħaratəŋ naŋra, masasiʦaɾaj to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a mafaɬ~ɮəsaj a ɾaɾo~umaʡan to~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ mitaŋiʦ, nano~uja miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʡiɾo~uaj rikəʦ ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mipaŋaŋanaj o~unto~u". itini i kasasiro~uma no~u siʦi a kasasiwto~uʦ, o~u ɾifajin i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kinato~uɾo~u misaʡo~usi miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ" saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a pisaɾo~uf, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u nia misamawmawaj mirawraw a ʡiɾo~u sanaj a təfo~uʦ, itini i sarikəʦ miɾaħəʦi to~u pako~uniraaj a ħaratəŋ, pako~uniraaj pikiŋkiw ato~u pako~uniraaj a so~uwaɾ. nikawrira o~u ko~u~umintaŋ i ɾifajin a sarəkaɬ~ɮ pipaʦiʡəʦi, o~u "ʦo~uŋħo~uaminko~u a rikəʦ saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ" ʦaaj ka saħəʦi ko~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ. kasato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan i **** miħəʦa, ʦi ɾiaw ʦiənħo~u~ua papina ʦaŋra pakajni i fɾjiŋb~v no~u finawɾan pipaso~uro~ut to~u pajso~u a miɾaħəʦi to~u nisjasiŋan a ika "mo~utaj panɾo~uanfan (saiko~uraj a mifəɾiħaj a ʦiʡiɾo~uaj), i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i **** po~unka misaŋaʡaj to~u kinaira a ʡətaɾ ko~uŋtin ħo~u~uasan ikakaŋ panəŋnəŋ, ʦi sħi miŋ mikiħatija itija to~u nia pinəŋnəŋan . * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ika i ʦaɾaj mapanəŋnəŋ. pinəŋnəŋan. misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf. tajwan siʦian ɾikisi. tajwan ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a miħəʦaan. ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan piʡarawan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *.***** tħə ɾast inso~u~urrəʦtio~un, jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və, (****-**-**), ( taiwan məmo~urj. ****-**-**) .
